title: Apple Valley Heat Wave
lead: Apple Valley is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.40. The event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Apple Valley has led to extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 10.9 GG. 
 The low humidity of 16% and moderate wind speed of 15.8 km/h are exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and the focus is on cooling.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
